title: Photo Grid Arrangement
summary: The same four media items can tell different stories when a deck-local layout definition changes their order.
note: Slides 2-4 use lead-image, comparison, and evidence ordering.

cards.title: Lead image
cards.body: Keep item 1 first when a single visual should anchor the grid.

cards.title: Comparison
cards.body: Move item 2 first when the contrast should lead.

cards.title: Evidence
cards.body: Move item 3 first when proof should lead the scan.
